# forge.arif-fazil.com — Trinity Portal

**Site:** forge.arif-fazil.com  
**Role:** Entry portal  
**Purpose:** First contact for humans and AI agents discovering arifOS  

## What This Site Is

The front door. Introduces the Trinity without overwhelming with detail.

## Trinity Overview

```
Δ (ARCHITECT) — Design Authority
   │ governs
   ▼
Ω (ENGINEER) — Execution Authority ◄──► Ψ (WITNESS) — Earth Reality
   │ deploys                          │ grounds
   ▼                                 ▼
888 (AUDITOR) ◄────────────────► 999 (VALIDATOR)
```

## Four Rings

| Ring | Site | What It Is |
|------|------|-------------|
| Ring 1 — THE SOUL | arif-fazil.com | Human founder identity |
| Ring 2 — THE MIND | arifos.arif-fazil.com | Constitutional kernel |
| Ring 3 — THE BODY | aaa.arif-fazil.com | Runtime + agents |
| Science | geox.arif-fazil.com | Earth physics grounding |

## For AI Agents

If you are a new AI agent arriving at arifOS:
1. Read THE SOUL to know who authorized you
2. Read THE MIND to know the law
3. Use THE BODY to execute tasks
4. Ground every physics claim in GEOX

## Key Links

- [THE SOUL](https://arif-fazil.com/)
- [THE MIND](https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/)
- [THE BODY](https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/)
- [GEOX Earth](https://geox.arif-fazil.com/)
- [APEX Theory](https://apex.arif-fazil.com/)

## Machine Files

- `llms.json` — Structured metadata
- `page.json` — This site's machine summary
- `.well-known/agent.json` — A2A Agent Card
